purpose: Complete reference for the Synapse repository's directory layout, listing every top-level directory and explaining what each contains -- _commands/, agent/, electron/, src/server/, src/ui/, dashboards/, Archive/, history/, queue/, conversations/, documentation/, etc. Serves as the authoritative map any agent or developer can use to locate code by responsibility.
gotchas: tasks/{date}/ is legacy -- planning artifacts now live in dashboards/{id}/plan.json
Some hook/skill names in CLAUDE.md must be cross-referenced here; mismatches indicate one is stale
patterns: Hierarchical directory map with one-line purpose annotations
conventions: Tree-style indented listings with connector characters
